mapper.sql: select task_id, task_no, user_id, user_name, repair_mode, source_type, source_urls, result_urls, result_video_url, status, progress, student_id, student_name, error_message, finished_time, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from repair_task
mapper.delete:
delete from repair_task where task_id in
#{taskId}
mapper.select: select date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as day, count(1) as total_count, sum(case when status = 'COMPLETED' then 1 else 0 end) as completed_count from repair_task where create_time >= date_sub(curdate(), interval #{days} day) group by date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') order by day asc
mapper.update: update repair_task set student_id = #{studentId}, student_name = #{studentName}, status = 'MANUAL_PROCESSING', progress = 40, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where task_id = #{taskId} and status = 'WAIT_STUDENT' and repair_mode = 'MANUAL'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM repair_task WHERE status = 'COMPLETED'
mapper.update: update repair_task set result_video_url = #{resultVideoUrl}, update_time = now() where task_id = #{taskId}
update repair_task set source_urls = #{sourceUrls}, result_urls = #{resultUrls}, result_video_url = #{resultVideoUrl}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.select: select source_urls from repair_task where source_urls is not null and source_urls != '' union all select result_urls from repair_task where result_urls is not null and result_urls != '' union all select result_video_url from repair_task where result_video_url is not null and result_video_url != ''
